# Suggested Git Commands

I cannot push to your GitHub repo directly from here, but you can apply this update like this:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/chenydx/Trip_Jun_2026.git
cd Trip_Jun_2026

# Copy the generated files into this folder:
# README.md
# itinerary_en.md
# itinerary_cn.md
# update_notes.md
# open_issues.md

git add README.md itinerary_en.md itinerary_cn.md update_notes.md open_issues.md
git commit -m "Update itinerary for 6/14 late-start plan"
git push origin main
```
